steps.title: Use two points
steps.content: The point $(0,5)$ is on the line. A slope of $7$ means one step to the right raises $y$ by $7$, so another point is $(1,12)$. Put these two rows in Desmos.

steps.title: Run linear regression
steps.content: Use $y_1 \sim mx_1+b$. Desmos gives $m=7$ and $b=5$, so the function is $f(x)=7x+5$.

steps.title: Match the answer
steps.content: Choice A has slope $5$ and no intercept. Choice B has slope $35$. Choice D has slope $12$. Only choice C has slope $7$ and intercept $5$, so choice C is correct.
